@slideforge
Carousel
A TRUE STORY
The Builder Who Almost Quit

A story about the space between failure and breakthrough.

SLIDEFORGE STORY JOURNEY
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

The Beginning: A Crazy Idea

June 2023 — a solo developer, a laptop, and a conviction that slides shouldn't take all day.

SLIDEFORGE STORY JOURNEY
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

The Doubt

Six months in. Zero users. The Python prototype worked, but nobody cared. 'Why would anyone use a CLI to make slides?' The forums were silent. The GitHub stars trickled. Every rational signal said quit.

SLIDEFORGE STORY JOURNEY
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

The Turning Point

One DM changed everything. 'Hey, your tool just saved me 8 hours on a client deck. Can I sponsor you?'

SLIDEFORGE STORY JOURNEY
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

The Proof

That DM led to a conversation. The conversation led to a case study. The case study led to 40 GitHub stars in a week. The lesson: build for one person, not a market. The market finds you.

SLIDEFORGE STORY JOURNEY
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

The Rewrite

Rust. The whole thing. From scratch. Because the Python version was 10x too slow for production use.

SLIDEFORGE STORY JOURNEY
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

The Dark Hour

Month 3 of the Rust rewrite. Three compiler errors for every feature. The borrow checker had opinions about everything. 'Why am I doing this to myself?' Because the Python version couldn't render 10 slides in under a second. And speed was the whole point.

SLIDEFORGE STORY JOURNEY
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

The Breakthrough

First benchmark: 47 slides rendered in 0.8 seconds. The Python version took 12.

SLIDEFORGE STORY JOURNEY
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

The Realization

The tool worked. But the real breakthrough wasn't technical — it was conceptual. Slides aren't documents. They're compositions. And compositions need a composer, not a template engine. That insight became the composition engine.

SLIDEFORGE STORY JOURNEY
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

The Present

47 slide types. 28 campaign presets. 85 tests passing. One binary. And a community that's just getting started.

SLIDEFORGE STORY JOURNEY
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

What Comes Next

The tool ships. The community grows. The presets multiply. But the mission stays the same: make slide creation so fast that the bottleneck shifts from production to imagination. That's when things get interesting.

SLIDEFORGE STORY JOURNEY
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign
CORE DEFINITION

The Builder's Journey

/ðə ˈbɪldərz ˈdʒɜːrni/

Every product that matters was built by someone who almost quit. The difference between shipped and abandoned is one more day of showing up.

If you're building something and it feels impossible, you're exactly where every meaningful project starts.

SLIDEFORGE STORY JOURNEY
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

The Whole Arc

BEFORE

Day 1: Zero code. Zero users. Zero evidence this would work. Just a conviction that slides shouldn't take all day.

→
AFTER

Today: 85 tests passing. 28 presets. 47 slide types. A tool that generates production carousels in 60 seconds.

Days of Building
547

What's Your Builder's Journey?

Open source. MIT licensed. Fork it. Ship it. Make it yours.
